entry.summary:
Author: Achillean_Ilion

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,029Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

entry.title: Lucky Girl
entry.summary:
Author: karmaswhiskee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,085Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 183

Summary: “GIRL!” Alicia unleashes a muffled scream. “You fucking won! Oh my God, you fucking actually won!”“Dude, what? What did I win?”“The competition to become the ‘9th member’ of Stray Kids for a year! This is the letter babe! Oh my god, I need autographs, you have to promise!”I sigh. “Alicia, slow down. I know they’re having this competition, but I didn’t enter, so this literally cannot be real.”“That’s because we entered for you!”Every sound around me suddenly disappears; all I can hear is the thudding pulse in my eardrums. No way. “Wha-what? Who’s we?”“Okay. Remember how I told you this was a special birthday and that you’d never forget your twenty-first?”“Yes…”

entry.title: Caretaking: A Discovery
entry.summary:
Author: mulchong

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,180Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: Chan has always been the caretaker of the group. He thrives on it, that rush of making someone’s world a little bit easier. Listening to his members' worries late into the night and offering hugs and reassurances is one of his favorite things. But lately, something new has wormed its way into his brain. Something he stumbled upon during a late night scroll. A kink he’d never even considered: the thrill of watching someone hold back until their body betrayed them, until they lost control right there in front of him.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Relapse
entry.summary:
Author: Paboveronica_143

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,100Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Jisung was your average university student. Buried in his studies, trying to finish his last year to get the hell out of his step-father's place. Until a new music teacher shows up. entry.title: Side Effects
entry.summary:
Author: TheLioness143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,181Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 78

Summary: ((AU Bang Chan x Female Reader)) It was only supposed to be one night. A chance to feel something again. A stolen moment with a masked stranger. No promises, just an escape. A couple of days later, you play the perfect wife at a dinner you didn’t want to attend, until you see him again. Chris is seated at the same table, unmasked, and watching you like he already knows how this ends. The stakes rise with every stolen glance. By the time the cards hit the table, you’re no longer just a wife on someone’s arm. You’re the prize. For the first time in a long time, you’re starting to wonder if that’s exactly what you want to be. Everything you’ve been running from catches up to you, surrounded by witnesses. You have to decide what comes next— whether you’re choosing freedom, or just trading one cage for another.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,651Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 169

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousands parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.

entry.title: Anchored
entry.summary:
Author: Kpoplover08

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,772Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 116

Summary: Han never expected to find a place where he felt safe. After years of feeling untethered in a world that demands labels and classifications, he finds himself thrust into a polycule that sees him—really sees him. What starts as tentative trust slowly becomes something deeper: comfort, belonging, and the terrifying possibility of permanence. But choosing to be anchored means choosing vulnerability. And Han has to decide if he’s ready to stop standing alone.

entry.title: no escaping him
entry.summary:
Author: scorchedlover99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 109

Summary: Hyunjin thought his relationship with Bang Chan was simply of platonic nature - until a specific performance has him second-guessing everything he ever knew. Is he reading into things, or are things between the two of them changing? Or was there always something there? Sparks fly, and Hyunjin is about to find out for sure...

entry.title: Two Ghostfaces and Nowhere to Run
entry.summary:
Author: lieslostinsilence

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,791Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 32

Summary: The silence in your house is the first thing they steal. A creaking floorboard, a distorted voice, and suddenly you are no longer alone. Two masked hunters step out of the shadows, patient and cruel, letting you run just long enough to enjoy the chase. Fear burns through you, but something darker rises with it. When they finally catch you, escape stops mattering. Panic turns into heat, control slips from your hands, and being hunted becomes something far more dangerous. Some predators do not want to kill you. They want to keep you.
